query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: resolve Drammen municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: get 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

3.description: get parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality using spatial intersection with flood zones

5.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per parcel
